usage: adjustFPlanChannel [-help] [-channelUtil <float>] [-constraints <constraint_file>] [-moveOnly] [-report <output_file>] [-reportOnly [-report_low_utilized_channels <float>] [-type {all fenceToFence fenceToCore fenceToMacro macroToMacro macroToCore}]]

options.name: -channelUtil
options.description: maximum utilization of routing tracks in channel

options.name: -constraints
options.description: file to specify constraints for floorplan objects

options.name: -report
options.description: default name <topcell>.channel, output the channel congestion, targeted channel adjustment, and final real floorplan adjustment

options.name: -reportOnly
options.description: only report channel congestion, no adjustment

options.name: -report_low_utilized_channels
options.description: only report channel congestion with low utilization

options.name: -type
options.description: {all fenceToFence fenceToCore fenceToMacro macroToMacro macroToCore} report channel congestion with specified types
